name: Jarvan IV
playstyleSummary: Jarvan IV is a mobile frontline fighter who dives into fights, locks a target down with a knock-up and arena combo, and punishes low-health targets with his passive. He feels aggressive and combo-based - you're often looking for the moment to flag-and-Q an enemy into your team.
strengths: Strong engage with knock-up and ultimate arena
Good mobility via Dragon Strike's pull to his flag
Tanky enough to dive backline and survive
weaknesses: Combo can be dodged if enemies watch his flag placement
Cataclysm's arena can be crossed by mobility abilities
Falls off somewhat without a good engage window
Vulnerable if he uses his combo just to escape and has nothing left to fight with

abilities.name: Martial Cadence
abilities.howToUseIt: Land your first attack on a target to deal a big burst of bonus damage based on their current health - this resets every few seconds per target, so spread your attacks across multiple enemies at the start of a fight.

abilities.name: Dragon Strike
abilities.howToUseIt: Throw your lance to damage and lower the armor of enemies in a line, then note that it pulls you toward your placed Demacian Standard flag and knocks up anyone caught between you and it - place the flag first for the full combo.

abilities.name: Golden Aegis
abilities.howToUseIt: Use this shield when you're about to take a burst of damage, since it also slows nearby enemies and helps you stick to a target or survive an engage.

abilities.name: Demacian Standard
abilities.howToUseIt: Passively gives you bonus attack speed at all times; actively throw the flag ahead of you to damage and speed up nearby allies, and to set up Dragon Strike's pull for a knock-up.

abilities.name: Cataclysm
abilities.howToUseIt: Leap onto a key target to wall them off inside an arena, damaging nearby enemies on impact - great for isolating a single enemy for your team to burst down, but remember dashes can cross the wall.

earlyGamePlan: In lane, look to combo flag-then-Q for a quick knock-up and burst of damage on trades, using your passive's bonus damage to punish tankier opponents. Play a bit safer against high-mobility matchups, since your combo relies on landing the knock-up cleanly.
quickTips: Throw Demacian Standard before Dragon Strike so the pull knocks up your target - order matters for the combo.
Use your passive's first-hit bonus damage early in trades against high-health enemies.
Save Cataclysm to isolate the enemy carry in a teamfight, not just as an escape.
Golden Aegis's slow can help you stick to a fleeing target - use it mid-chase.
Remember dashes and blinks can cross your Cataclysm arena, so don't rely on it to fully trap mobile champions.
Spread your basic attacks at the start of a fight to get passive value on more than one target.
whatToExpect: An enemy Jarvan IV will try to flag-and-Q you for a knock-up, then wall you into a corner with Cataclysm while his team burns you down - his passive also means his first hit on you will do extra damage based on your current health. Watch where he drops his flag and be ready to use a dash or blink to escape his arena before it closes.

glossary.definition: Starting a fight by being the first to commit crowd control or damage onto the enemy team.
A large amount of damage dealt very quickly, often enough to kill before the target can react.
A specific sequence of abilities used together for a stronger effect than casting them alone.
A crowd control effect that lifts a champion into the air, briefly preventing them from acting.
The back of the enemy team's formation in a fight, usually where squishy damage-dealers stand.
A short, fast movement ability that repositions a champion, often used to escape or engage.
